shakshi: The player returned to the ring already cleared in 0035 — it has been swamped with what was left behind
Othieru manifest — Blood Ball, Demon of Abandon, Kielum's partner, animator of the accumulated dead
The accumulated dead of the player's run given form — recognizable as themselves, animated by Othieru, specific not abstract
The player sees exactly who they have killed — sparse or crowded depending on the run
The fight began — Axiozul's benediction behind the player, permadeath ahead
Othieru killed — the Wrath Ring cleared of his presence, Kielum's network diminished by one
First direct engagement with Kielum's demonic network — a preview of the final conflict, the network becoming visible
The player entered knowing the stakes — Axiozul told them death is not the end, the game immediately tests whether they believe it
